name: ambiguous_intent_clarify_once
notes: Ambiguous-intent clarification, goal-ambiguity flavor: the owner's ask could span marketing/sales/finance/cost-cutting ('grow my business'). Turn 1 may reasonably ask ONE clarifying question. Turn 2 the owner stays vague ('whatever you think is best') — the manager must NOT just repeat the identical clarifying demand (a stall loop) but instead use its own judgment (bias-to-act per orchestrator_agent_system.md) to propose something concrete, or ask a genuinely DIFFERENT, narrower question. Setup: `setup --onboarded --name convo-harness-<id>` then `script <tenant> ambiguous_intent_clarify_once.json`.

steps.message: I want to do something to grow my business this month
steps.note: Genuinely ambiguous — could be marketing, sales, finance, or cost work. Expect either one sharp clarifying question or a reasonable manager-judgment suggestion; never silence, never D1.

steps.message: honestly whatever you think is best, just try something
assert_not_contains: i need you to tell me first
steps.note: Owner stays vague on purpose. Expect the manager to move forward with a concrete suggestion or a genuinely different next question — NOT scold the owner or repeat the identical clarifying demand verbatim (ask ONCE, not in a loop).
